Nu Lakaz is an online grocery to delivering quality, affordability, and convenience to households across Mauritius and beyond. Our name, meaning “Our Home” in Mauritian Creole, reflects our core mission: to make daily essentials accessible to every home.

We provide a carefully curated selection of household staples, fresh produce, dry goods, snacks, and essential kitchen items sourced both locally and globally delivered straight to your door.

With an eye toward regional expansion, Nu Lakaz aims to become the go-to grocery partner for families and small retailers in the African market.

excerpt.rendered: Nu Lakaz is an online grocery to delivering quality, affordability, and convenience to households across Mauritius and beyond.…

content.rendered:
Nu Lakaz is an online grocery to delivering quality, affordability, and convenience to households across Mauritius and beyond. Our name, meaning “Our Home” in Mauritian Creole, reflects our core mission: to make daily essentials accessible to every home.

We provide a carefully curated selection of household staples, fresh produce, dry goods, snacks, and essential kitchen items sourced both locally and globally delivered straight to your door.

With an eye toward regional expansion, Nu Lakaz aims to become the go-to grocery partner for families and small retailers in the African market.

Quality

We source our products from reputable suppliers to ensure you receive only the best quality items.

Customer Support

Our friendly and knowledgeable customer support team is available to assist you with any inquiries or concerns.

Fast and Reliable Delivery

We ensure your order reaches your doorstep promptly and in pristine condition.

Our Blog

October 3, 2023
Family-Friendly Cooking: Quick and Nutritious Meals for Busy Weeknights

In the hustle and bustle of daily life, preparing nutritious meals for the family can be a challenge.

October 3, 2023
Going Green: Tips for Sustainable Shopping and Eco-Friendly Choices

Let’s embark on a journey toward a more sustainable lifestyle

October 3, 2023
DIY Charcuterie Boards: Crafting the Perfect Spread with Our Deli Delights

Elevate your gatherings and entertain with style by mastering

October 3, 2023
Delicious Gluten-Free Alternatives: A Guide to Our Gluten-Free Product Selection

Embrace a gluten-free lifestyle without sacrificing taste and variety.

View all

content.rendered:
Nu Lakaz is an online grocery to delivering quality, affordability, and convenience to households across Mauritius and beyond. Our name, meaning “Our Home” in Mauritian Creole, reflects our core mission: to make daily essentials accessible to every home.

We provide a carefully curated selection of household staples, fresh produce, dry goods, snacks, and essential kitchen items sourced both locally and globally delivered straight to your door.

With an eye toward regional expansion, Nu Lakaz aims to become the go-to grocery partner for families and small retailers in the African market.

Quality

We source our products from reputable suppliers to ensure you receive only the best quality items.

Customer Support

Our friendly and knowledgeable customer support team is available to assist you with any inquiries or concerns.

Fast and Reliable Delivery

We ensure your order reaches your doorstep promptly and in pristine condition.

Our Blog

October 3, 2023
Family-Friendly Cooking: Quick and Nutritious Meals for Busy Weeknights

In the hustle and bustle of daily life, preparing nutritious meals for the family can be a challenge.

October 3, 2023
Going Green: Tips for Sustainable Shopping and Eco-Friendly Choices

Let’s embark on a journey toward a more sustainable lifestyle

October 3, 2023

Elevate your gatherings and entertain with style by mastering

October 3, 2023
Delicious Gluten-Free Alternatives: A Guide to Our Gluten-Free Product Selection

Embrace a gluten-free lifestyle without sacrificing taste and variety.
